heading: Service medals: issue; replacement; availability of appropriations
label: 9281 Service medals: issue; replacement; availability of appropriations
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8751(a)8751(b)8751(c)10:1415a (less 21st through 30th words, and less clauses (a) through (n)).10:1415b (less applicability to 10:1415a (clauses (a) through (n))).10:1415c (less applicability to 10:1415a (clauses (a) through (n)))., §§ 1 (less 25th through 34th words, and less clauses (a) through (n)), 2 (less applicability to § 1 (clauses (a) through (n))), 3 (less applicability to § 1 (clauses (a) through (n))), .May 12, 1928, ch. 52845 Stat. 500In subsection (a), the words “authorized for members of the Air Force after ” are substituted for the words “hereafter authorized”, since, under Transfer Order 1, that date was the effective date of the transfer of personnel from the Army to the Air Force under section 208(e) of the National Security Act of 1947, as amended (). 10:1415a (proviso) is omitted as surplusage, since the revised section is not limited to persons who are members of the Air Force at the time of the issue.September 26, 19475 U.S.C. 626c(e)In subsection (b), the words “member of the Air Force” are substituted for the words “persons in the military service of the United States”.In subsection (c), the last 16 words are substituted for 10:1415c (last 16 words).

Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “the Air Force” wherever appearing after the first appearance.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8751 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force shall procure, and issue without charge to any person entitled thereto, any service medal authorized for members of the Air Force or the Space Force after , and any ribbon, clasp, star, or similar device prescribed as a part of that medal.September 26, 1947

children.label: b
children.text: Under such regulations as the Secretary may prescribe, any medal or other device issued under subsection (a) that is lost, destroyed, or becomes unfit for use without fault or neglect of the owner, may be replaced at cost. However, if the owner is a member of the Air Force or the Space Force, the medal or device may be replaced without charge.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary may spend, from any appropriation for the support of the Air Force or the Space Force, amounts necessary to provide medals and devices under this section.
